descriptions.text: Resident Evil 3: The Only One starts out as a remake of Resident Eevil 3, with a black screen and a dialogue between Jill and Brad. Something is chasing Jill, and after the first dialogue, an explosion occurs in your apartment (different from the original) and takes you to the streets of Raccoon where you'll meet the creature that's been chasing you for the first time. Jill will have to find a way to get rid of that creature while she travels through a city where only entrails and the smell of rotting corpses have their place.
